expires_in.description: The lifetime in seconds of the "device_code" and "user_code".

interval.description:
The minimum amount of time in seconds that the client
SHOULD wait between polling requests to the token endpoint.  If no
value is provided, clients MUST use 5 as the default.

verification_uri.description:
The end-user verification URI on the authorization
server.  The URI should be short and easy to remember as end users
will be asked to manually type it into their user agent.

verification_uri_complete.description:
A verification URI that includes the "user_code" (or
other information with the same function as the "user_code"),
which is designed for non-textual transmission.

error_debug.description:
Error Debug Information

Only available in dev mode.

error_hint.description:
Error Hint

Helps the user identify the error cause.
error_hint.example: The redirect URL is not allowed.
